name: Cowhide Collection (Cows)
description: Kill cows in Lumbridge, collect cowhides, and sell on GE. Zero requirements, great starter money for new players.
profitNote: Consistent low-level money. Prices fluctuate with GE demand for crafting.

name: Looting (Lumbridge/Wilderness)
description: Loot items dropped by other players in popular areas. Can be done in Lumbridge graveyard or Wilderness PvP areas.
profitNote: Highly variable depending on PvP activity and world population.

name: Telegrabbing Wines of Zamorak
description: Use Telekinetic Grab to steal Wines of Zamorak from the Wilderness Chaos Temple. Requires 33 Magic. Low risk if using shortcut.
profitNote: Competitive spot. Price of wines drops during bot waves. Safe with proper timing.

name: Mining Iron Ore
description: Mine iron ore at the Al Kharid mine or Varrock southeast mine. Fast banking via nearby deposits. Excellent AFK money for F2P.
profitNote: Steady market price. Iron ore always in demand for Smithing training.

name: Fishing Lobsters (F2P)
description: Fish lobsters at Musa Point in Karamja. Bank at deposit box or use dueling rings. Very AFK, decent starter cash.
profitNote: Very AFK. Prices stable. Good for passive income while watching streams.

name: Woodcutting Yew Logs (F2P)
description: Cut yew trees in Edgeville or Varrock. Bank nearby. Classic F2P moneymaker with good AFK time.
profitNote: Competitive tree spots. Magic logs (P2P) are better gp/hr but yews are solid for F2P.

name: Making Unfinished Pizzas
description: Buy pizza bases and cheese from GE, add cheese to base, sell on GE. High volume flipping through processing.
profitNote: Requires fast clicks. Profit per pizza is small but volume is high.

name: Crafting Jewelry (No Gem) - F2P
description: Smelt silver bars and craft into tiaras or holy symbols. Low profit margin but consistent and simple.
profitNote: Low competition. Steady profit margins for alting.

name: Wintertodt
description: Solo the Wintertodt boss for consistent firemaking XP and decent loot. Low requirements, safe death mechanics.
profitNote: Dependent on supply crate RNG. Consistent 300-600k/hr. Best at low HP for fewer food costs.

name: Motherlode Mine
description: Mine pay-dirt at the Motherlode Mine in the Dwarven Mountains. Earn golden nuggets for prospector outfit and sell ore.
profitNote: AFK-friendly. Upper level is better for XP and profit. Rune ores add significant value at higher levels.

name: Fishing Monkfish
description: Fish monkfish south of Piscatoris. Extremely AFK with fishing spot never moving. Great for alts or passive income.
profitNote: Top-tier AFK money maker. Can watch movies while fishing. Very stable prices.

name: Woodcutting Magic Logs
description: Cut magic trees at the Woodcutting Guild. High competition for trees but best AFK woodcutting profit in OSRS.
profitNote: Competitive tree spots at peak hours. Redwoods (90 WC) are more AFK but magic logs are better gp/hr.

name: Blast Furnace (Smithing)
description: Smith bars at the Blast Furnace in Keldagrim. Fastest smithing XP and great profit making mithril/adamantite bars.
requirements: 60 Smithing, Ice Gloves, coal bag recommended
profitNote: Intense clicking but excellent profit. Gold smithing with gauntlets yields best XP, mithril/adamant for profit.

name: Making Cannonballs
description: Smelt steel bars into cannonballs at a furnace. Very AFK - click once every few minutes. Classic alt money maker.
profitNote: Extremely AFK. Best done on an alt while main does other content. Steady demand for Slayer.

name: Cleaning Herbs
description: Buy grimy herbs on GE, clean them, and sell for profit. Low requirement merching-style moneymaker with Herblore XP.
requirements: 1 Herblore (scales with level for better herbs)
profitNote: Requires fast clicking. Profit margin varies by herb type and GE prices.

name: Crafting Jewelry (Gold/Gems)
description: Craft gold bars with gems into rings, necklaces, and amulets. Sell on GE or high alch for profit. Best at higher levels.
profitNote: Diamond and dragonstone jewelry yields best profit. High alch values provide price floor.

name: Runecrafting Nature Runes
description: Run nature runes through the Abyss or via the Karamja hard diary teleport method. Classic P2P moneymaker.
profitNote: Karamja gloves 3 method is faster but requires hard diary. Abyss method has PK risk.

name: Runecrafting Law Runes
description: Craft law runes via the Abyss. Requires 54 Runecrafting. Excellent profit due to high demand for teleport spells.
profitNote: Law runes have very stable demand. PK risk in Abyss. Use prayer and tank gear.

name: Runecrafting Death Runes
description: Craft death runes at 65+ Runecrafting through the Abyss. Maximum profit from the runecrafting skill.
profitNote: Very high profit but also high PK risk. Bring stam potions and anti-pk gear.

name: Herblore (Ranarr Potions)
description: Mix ranarr weeds with vials of water to create prayer potions. High demand item with consistent profit margins.
profitNote: Fast cash. Prices spike during PvM hours. Can also mix at grand exchange for quick flips.

name: Farming Hops/Grimy Herbs
description: Plant and harvest herb patches across Gielinor. Ranarr/snapdragon seeds yield best profit. Passive money over time.
profitNote: Best done as daily runs between other activities. Auto-weed and ultracompost recommended.

name: Hunter (Black Chinchompas)
description: Catch black chinchompas in the Wilderness. High profit but constant PK risk. Requires good game awareness.
profitNote: Very high risk of PKers. Use low value gear and maintain constant awareness. Best profit of all hunter methods.

name: Cooking Anglerfish
description: Cook raw anglerfish at the Hosidius kitchen range. No burn chance at 84+ Cooking with cooking cape. Consistent profit.
profitNote: No burn at 84+ means pure profit. Very AFK method. Anglerfish prices are stable.

name: Crafting Dragonstone Jewelry
description: Craft dragonstone amulets or rings from uncut dragonstones. High alch for guaranteed profit floor.
profitNote: Faster profit with high alch. Dragonstone jewelry is always in demand for enchanting.

name: Green Dragons
description: Kill green dragons in the Wilderness for dragon bones and green d'hide. Great early P2P money with decent combat stats.
profitNote: PKers are common. Use 3-item risk, bring teleport, and watch the minimap. Best at non-peak hours.

name: Chaos Druids
description: Kill Chaos Druids in Taverley dungeon for herb drops. Excellent early-game P2P moneymaker with no requirements.
profitNote: Great for early ironmen and low-level P2P players. Stack of ranarr weeds and law runes add up fast.

name: Ogress Warriors
description: Kill Ogress Warriors in the Corsair Cove dungeon. Best F2P combat money maker with great alchable drops.
profitNote: Best consistent GP/hr in F2P combat. Rune full helms, adamant boots, and nature runes are valuable drops.

name: Hill Giants (Mossy Keys/Obor)
description: Kill hill giants in Edgeville dungeon for big bones and mossy keys. The Obor boss drops add significant RNG value.
profitNote: Obor key drops and giant key RNG make this variable. AFK-friendly in multi-combat.

name: Flesh Crawlers
description: Kill Flesh Crawlers in the Stronghold of Security. Zero risk of death, aggressive monsters, very AFK combat training.
profitNote: Low GP/hr but safe and AFK. Herbs and coins add up over time. Best for training alts.

name: Vorkath
description: Kill the dragon boss Vorkath post-Dragon Slayer 2. Best consistent PvM money in OSRS with the head RNG.
profitNote: Consistent 2-4m/hr with DHCB or Bow of Faerdhinen. Dragonfire ward and salve (ei) highly recommended.

name: Zulrah
description: Kill the serpentine boss Zulrah in the swamp. High skill ceiling boss with massive profit from unique drops.
profitNote: Learning curve is steep. Once mastered, very consistent profit. Tanzanite/Magic fangs and serpentine visage are big ticket drops.

name: Giant Mole
description: Kill the Giant Mole under Falador. Easy boss with decent consistent profit from mole claws/skin and bird nests.
profitNote: Easy boss. Falador hard diary for teleport is a game changer. Bird nests are valuable passive profit.

name: Barrows
description: Loot the six Barrows brothers crypts in Morytania. Roll for barrows equipment pieces. Morytania hard diary boosts profit.
profitNote: RNG dependent on barrows item rolls. Morytania hard diary gives 50% more runes from chest.

name: Sarachnis
description: Kill Sarachnis in the Temple of the Eye dungeon. Accessible mid-level boss with spider eggs and cudgel as big drops.
requirements: 70+ Combat, Temple of the Eye access
profitNote: Sarachnis cudgel is a rare but valuable drop. Spider eggs on crushed nest table provide steady profit.

name: Demonic Gorillas
description: Kill Demonic Gorillas in the Crash Site Cave. Requires switching between attack styles. Zenyte shard drops are extremely valuable.
profitNote: High intensity prayer/gear switching. Zenyte shards worth 10m+ each. Gear switches are essential.

name: Dagannoth Kings
description: Kill all three Dagannoth Kings in Waterbirth Island. Tribridding for best efficiency. Rings and axes are valuable uniques.
profitNote: Best done on task. Berserker ring is a common and valuable drop. Requires tribrid gear setup.

name: Chambers of Xeric (CoX)
description: Complete the Chambers of Xeric raid in Mount Quidamotem. High variance but massive profit from unique drops like twisted bow.
requirements: 80+ all combat stats, 60+ Prayer, 78+ Herblore recommended
profitNote: Twisted bow is the single most expensive item in OSRS. Scale with team for consistency. Solos for max profit potential.

name: Theatre of Blood (ToB)
description: Complete the Theatre of Blood raid in Morytania. The hardest raid in OSRS with the highest GP/hour potential from scythe of vitur.
profitNote: Very steep learning curve. Scythe of vitur and justiciar pieces are massive profits. Hard mode ToB has even better rates.

name: The Nightmare of Ashihama
description: Kill the Nightmare in the Sisterhood Sanctuary. Group boss with massive unique drops including Inquisitor's equipment.
profitNote: Best done in teams of 5. Inquisitor's mace is worth 500m+. Phosani's nightmare (solo) is even more profitable.

name: Nex (God Wars Dungeon)
description: Kill Nex in the Ancient Prison below God Wars Dungeon. OSRS's toughest group boss with torva armour as the top prize.
profitNote: Requires a 4-8 person team. Torva platebody and legs are 1b+ items. Masori gear is also very valuable.

name: The Inferno (Fight Caves)
description: Complete the Inferno for the infernal cape. Not repeatable for profit but cape sellers earn massive amounts per run.
profitNote: Not a repeatable money maker for most players. Cape sellers charge 30-50m per cape. Extremely difficult.

name: GE Flipping (High Volume Items)
description: Buy items at low price and sell at high price on the Grand Exchange. Focus on high volume items like runes, arrows, and potions.
profitNote: Profit scales with capital. With 10m you can make 500k/hr. Requires good GE price knowledge. Zero risk of losing items.

name: Flipping OSRS Bonds
description: Buy OSRS bonds below market price and sell when demand increases. Bonds have stable long-term demand.
profitNote: Low volume, high margin. Best to buy bonds during DMM or league events when prices dip.

name: Gear Investing (Long Term)
description: Buy and hold PvM gear items when they are low. Sell during peak PvM seasons. Requires market knowledge and patience.
profitNote: Best items to invest: raids uniques (tbow, scythe, shadows), torva, and masori. Risky - can lose money if market crashes.

name: Picking Up Loot (PvP World)
description: Loot items dropped by killed players in PvP worlds. Low level accounts can loot in safe zones near banks.
profitNote: Highly variable. Good during DMM or peak hours. You need to be fast to grab loot before others.

name: Lava Dragons
description: Kill Lava Dragons in the deep Wilderness for lava dragon bones and dragonhide. Extreme PK risk but excellent profit.
profitNote: Extremely high PKer traffic. Use 3-item risk, bring one-click teleport, and be ready to anti-pk. Bones are 10k+ each.

name: Fishing Anglerfish
description: Fish anglerfish in the fishing spot near the Piscatoris bank. Very AFK with high level requirement and great profit.
profitNote: Very AFK. You can fish 200+ anglerfish per hour. Excellent for alts or when doing other tasks IRL.

name: Woodcutting Redwood Logs
description: Cut redwood trees at the Woodcutting Guild. Extremely AFK - each tree lasts minutes. Lower profit than magics but much more relaxed.
profitNote: Most AFK money maker in the game. Click a tree and wait 2-5 minutes. Great for Zeah RC library method too.

name: Blast Furnace (Gold Smelting)
description: Smelt gold bars at the Blast Furnace with goldsmith gauntlets. Best Smithing XP in the game with marginal profit at higher levels.
profitNote: Better for XP than profit but can break even or small profit at high GE margins.

name: Runecrafting Blood Runes
description: Craft blood runes at Zeah Blood Altar. Very AFK runecrafting method with solid profit. No PK risk compared to Abyss methods.
profitNote: Safe and AFK. Dark essence blocks need to be mined and charged. Can make 400k+ GP/hr at 90+ RC.

name: Commander Zilyana (Saradomin GWD)
description: Kill Commander Zilyana in the God Wars Dungeon. Armadyl crossbow and Saradomin sword are valuable drops.
profitNote: Best with crossbow and bolt procs. ACB is still a 50m+ drop. Kree'arra is alternatives for ranged GWD.

name: High Level Slayer (Gargoyles/Nechryael)
description: Complete high-level Slayer tasks for valuable drops and Slayer points. Gargoyles, Nechryael, and Kurasks are especially profitable.
profitNote: Different slayer masters offer different tasks. Duradel/Nieve for best profit tasks. Use cannon for faster kills.
